epigraph.quote: With the help of William's new torch + a beautiful full moon we made it safely home.

moments.quote: We had lunch near Rugby & Crick, on farmland.
Half an hour later we heard on the radio that there were 1½ mile queues in either direction
Wednesday night we spent camped on the road outside the Edwards' house. ... __Canterbury__, the day the new archbishop cho[se]
We set off at 8.50. & came across on the Pride of Calais, big & clean.
came across on the Pride of Calais, big & clean. We had lunch outside a farm barn near St. Omer
We had lunch outside a farm barn near St. Omer
coffee & orangina in the square
Beatrice is getting married tomorrow.
We saw Reims Cathedral, arches, Chagall stained glass '74.
William kept very quiet during his first course listening out for his lobster's cream
Thomas set of for 5 croissants, refused to believe the woman when she presented them, + instead struggled back with 5 baguettes which lasted delicious.
it was 39°. We came to a campsite on Doue River, near Colombiers te Vieux
Motoring south afterwards, through lyons + on to Tourion, it was 39°. We came to a campsite on __Doue River__, near __Colombiers te Vieux__
We swam in the camp swimming pool.
We have bought lavender honey at Gerbier de Jonc.
Pine trees, a beautiful view & swimming in the lake.
It was lived in continuously by the same family (with 2 or 3 female inheritors) from about 1200 to 1792.
It would be even more beautiful if it weren't so crowded.
A fairy tale castle, with shining turrets & a beautiful garden 'les terraces' with water in a moat at one end of the garden.
An old lady who knows the Nayelle's well, was sweeping around the church & sold us peaches, strawberries, apple juice.

images.caption: Aigueze village skyline with church tower
River gorge scene with boats and cliffs

moments.quote: Beautiful view across the river Ardèche to Aiguèze with crenellated walls on towers + church. 3 church bells dong the hours.
Simon immediately found an isolated field which made an idyllic overnight stop ****.
The arches in the side aisles are glorious pink + grey stone — same as the colours in the van interior.
Thomas + William + Peter are most impressed by the automation in the motor-way stop loos — you just touch a pad for flushing.
we ended up in a dreadful campsite — almost like a gypsy encampment.
Simon made them a cup of tea + we had their clobber on the floor.
we went to west of Folkestone to see the Channel Tunnel Exhibition Centre
